ddls:
CREATE TABLE "revenue_rulings" (
  "ruling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue ruling */,
  "ruling_number" TEXT /* Official number of the revenue ruling */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the revenue ruling */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue ruling was issued */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Issue number of the Internal Revenue Bulletin (I.R.B.) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the revenue ruling in the I.R.B. */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number in the I.R.B. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the revenue ruling (e.g., active, superseded) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revenue ruling */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revenue ruling was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the revenue ruling */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revenue ruling was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the ruling becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the ruling expires */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ruling (e.g., income tax, corporate tax) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier searching */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the ruling */,
  "related_documents" TEXT /* Related document IDs for cross-referencing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_rulings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_rulings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue procedure */,
  "procedure_number" TEXT /* Official number of the revenue procedure */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the revenue procedure */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue procedure was issued */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Issue number of the Internal Revenue Bulletin (I.R.B.) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the revenue procedure in the I.R.B. */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number in the I.R.B. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the revenue procedure (e.g., active, superseded) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revenue procedure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revenue procedure was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the revenue procedure */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revenue procedure was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure expires */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the procedure (e.g., income tax, corporate tax) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier searching */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the procedure */,
  "related_documents" TEXT /* Related document IDs for cross-referencing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_procedures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_procedures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., modified, superseded, clarified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., major update, minor update, clarification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document (revenue ruling or procedure) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken on the document */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the version */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (ruling or procedure) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES document_actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document relationship */,
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source document */,
  "target_document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target document */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken between the documents */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., modification, clarification, supersession) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_source_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES document_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_target_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_target_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_source_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Issue number of the I.R.B. */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "issue_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., Tax Law, Tax Regulations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_number FOREIGN KEY ("issue_number") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("issue_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_number FOREIGN KEY ("issue_number") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("issue_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of attachment (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "attachment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_attachments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_attachments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES revenue_rulings ("ruling_id")
)
